external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office - Building Permits and Inspection Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Registered property owner/s, duly authorized individuals who shall construct, alter, repair, convert and add any building or structure

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Application Form for Building Permit (6 original) & Ancillary Permits (Electrical, Mechanical, Sanitary, Electronics - 4 original each)
Valid PRC ID and current PTR of professionals (6 original)
Design Plans (Architectural, Structural, Electrical, Mechanical, Sanitary, Electronics), Specifications, and Bill of Materials (6 copies each)
Certified True Copy of TCT, Tax Declaration, and Current Tax Receipt (6 photocopies each)
Barangay Clearance, Locational Clearance, and FSEC from BFP

steps.client_step: 1. Sign on the Visitor's Log Book and submit complete set of requirements and clearances
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.5: Receive documents, evaluate plans (Architectural, Civil, Electrical, etc.), and prepare/review Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III, Architect II

steps.client_step: 2. Inquire on status; if approved, get Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2: Sign assessment form and direct client to Treasurer
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Administrative Aide II

steps.client_step: 3. Pay fees at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 3. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II/III

steps.client_step: 4. Submit complete requirements and Official Receipt to CEO
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.5: Check payment, final sign-off by technical heads, and prepare endorsement for final approval
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III, technical specialists

steps.client_step: 5. Return to CEO for the approved permit number and releasing
steps.agency_action: 5. Record approved permits and release client's copies
steps.person_responsible: Community Affairs Officer III

total.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code

external_services.service_name: Application for Certificate for Water Connection
external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office - Building Permits and Inspection Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person, firm or corporation in need of water service connection

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Photograph of building (front, sides, rear) and Location Sketch
Updated Real Property Tax Receipt/Clearance and Cedula (2 photocopies)
Proof of Ownership (Affidavit of Consent, Deed of Sale, or CLOA)

steps.client_step: 1. Sign in Client Log Book and submit requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.5: Receive application, interview applicant, and conduct ocular inspection (within 2 days)
steps.person_responsible: Building Inspector, Administrative Aide II

steps.client_step: 2. Return to secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2: Assess fees and prepare Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Engineer IV, Administrative Aide II

steps.client_step: 3. Pay fees at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 3. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II/III

steps.client_step: 4. Return to CEO to submit Proof of Payment
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.3: Prepare and sign Water Certification
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III

steps.client_step: 5. Claim water certification and sign Record Book
steps.agency_action: 5. Release permits and secure signature
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II/IV

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office - Building Permits and Inspection Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person/firm with an approved building permit occupying a completed structure

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certificate of Completion signed by Architect/Civil Engineer (1 original)
Approved Building, Sanitary, Electrical, Mechanical, and Electronics Permits (1 photocopy each)
Construction Logbook and Photos of completed structure

steps.client_step: 1. Sign in Log Book and submit requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive certificate, assess fees, and prepare Certificate of Occupancy
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II, JO - Engineer I

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to BFP and CPDO for clearances
steps.agency_action: 2. Direct client to City Planning and BFP for final inspections
steps.person_responsible: JO - Engineer I

steps.client_step: 3. Return to CEO and submit issuances
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.4: Schedule and conduct actual inspection (3 days), prepare Compliance Evaluation Sheet
steps.person_responsible: Engineer IV, Architect II, Building Inspector

steps.client_step: 4. Secure Order of Payment (if compliant)
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.4: Prepare, review, and sign Order of Payment (within 3 days)
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV, JO - Engineer I

steps.client_step: 5. Pay fees at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 5. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II/III

steps.client_step: 6. Submit Official Receipt and claim Certificate of Occupancy
steps.agency_action: 6.1-6.5: Verify payment, sign-off by technical specialists, review, and release
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV, technical heads

total.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office - Building Permits and Inspection Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizen, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Owners/operators of machinery or prime movers within a building or structure

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Approved Mechanical Permit and Mechanical Plans/Specification (2 original)
Valid PRC ID and current PTR of involved professionals (1 original)
Certificate of Completion and Request for Inspection
Valid ID and Notarized Authorization/SPA (if representative)

steps.client_step: 1. Sign in Log Book and submit requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive documents and check for completeness; inform of 3-day inspection window
steps.person_responsible: Engineering Assistant, Engineer II

steps.client_step: 2. Wait for evaluation result; resubmit if non-compliant
steps.agency_action: 2. Evaluate plans and documents for compliance
steps.person_responsible: Engineering Assistant, Engineer II

steps.client_step: 3. Prepare area for inspection; correct installation if needed
steps.agency_action: 3.2-3.6: Conduct site inspection, prepare and issue Order of Payment if compliant
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV, Engineering Assistant

steps.client_step: 4. Pay fees at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 4. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II/III

steps.client_step: 5. Return to CEO, present Official Receipt, and claim Certificate
steps.agency_action: 5.1-5.7: Verify payment, print, sign, and release Certificate of Operation
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV, Engineering Assistant

total.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office - Building Permits and Inspection Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizen, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person/firm demolishing a building or structure within Lipa City

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Notarized Application Form for Demolition Permit (4 original)
Valid PRC ID and current PTR of involved professionals
Barangay Clearance, Tax Declaration, and Updated Tax Receipt/Clearance (2 photocopies)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Barangay Hall / Assessor's Office / Treasurer's Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Valid ID with specimen signature (1 original)

steps.client_step: 1. Sign in Log Book and submit complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Assess completeness and schedule site inspection within 2 days
steps.person_responsible: JO - Engineer I, Architect II, Engineer III

steps.client_step: 2. Wait for scheduled inspection; comply with corrections if needed
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.8: Conduct inspection, prepare report, evaluate docs, and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV, Building Inspector

steps.client_step: 3. Secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 3. Issue Order of Payment to Client
steps.person_responsible: JO - Engineer I, Administrative Aide II

steps.client_step: 4. Pay fees at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 4. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II/III

steps.client_step: 5. Return to CEO, submit proof of payment, and claim permit
steps.agency_action: 5.1-5.4: Verify receipt, sign for approval, and release Demolition Permit
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III, JO - Engineer I

total.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office - Building Permits and Inspection Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizen, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person/firm in need of electric service connection within Lipa City

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Photos of house and electric service entrance, plus Location Sketch
Updated Real Property Tax Receipt/Clearance and Cedula
Proof of Ownership (Affidavit of Consent, Deed of Sale, NHA Cert, etc.)

steps.client_step: 1. Sign in Log Book and submit requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.5: Receive application, evaluate requirements, and conduct ocular inspection (within 2 days)
steps.person_responsible: Building Inspector, Administrative Aide II

steps.client_step: 2. Return to secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.6: Prepare Order of Payment, endorsements, and verify zoning/fire safety compliance
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, CPDO, Bureau of Fire Protection

steps.client_step: 3. Pay fees at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 3. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Revised IRR of NBCP and Fire Code
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II/III

steps.client_step: 4. Return to CEO to submit Proof of Payment
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.3: Prepare and sign Electrical Permit forms
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III

steps.client_step: 5. Claim the Electrical permit and sign Record Book
steps.agency_action: 5. Record and release permit
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II/IV

total.fees: Based on Revised IRR of NBCP and Fire Code

external_services.service_name: Application for Excavation and Ground Preparation Permit
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Excavation and Ground Preparation Permit
external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office - Building Permits and Inspection Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person/firm intending to excavate within Lipa City

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Application Form, Architectural & Structural Plans (signed/sealed, 4 originals for form, 2 for plans)
Barangay Clearance, TCT, Tax Declaration, and Updated Tax Receipt/Clearance
Valid PRC ID and PTR of professionals

steps.client_step: 1. Sign in Log Book and submit requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.7: Assess requirements, conduct site inspection (2 days), and approve Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV, Architect II

steps.client_step: 2. Return to secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 2. Issue Order of Payment to Client
steps.person_responsible: JO - Engineer I

steps.client_step: 3. Pay fees at the City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 3. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II/III

steps.client_step: 4. Return to CEO to submit Proof of Payment and claim permit
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.4: Verify receipt, sign approval, and release Permit
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III, JO - Engineer I

total.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office - Building Permits and Inspection Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person/firm intending to construct a fence within Lipa City

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Notarized Application Form, Architectural/Structural Plans, and Bill of Materials (6 originals each)
TCT, Tax Declaration, Updated Tax Receipt, and Barangay Clearance (6 copies each)
Valid PRC ID and current PTR of professionals (6 originals)
Locational Clearance from CPDO and FSEC (if with electrical fixtures)

steps.client_step: 1. Sign in Log Book and submit requirements with Locational Clearance
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive documents and check for completeness
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II, JO - Engineer I

steps.client_step: 2. Return to CEO if non-compliant; otherwise wait for inspection
steps.agency_action: 2.1: Evaluate plans (Architectural, Line & Grade, Structural)
steps.person_responsible: Architect II, Building Inspector, Engineer III

steps.client_step: 3. Attend scheduled inspection
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.5: Conduct inspection (within 3 days), assess fees, and approve Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III, Architect II

steps.client_step: 4. Obtain Order of Payment and endorsements
steps.agency_action: 4. Issue Order of Payment and advise client to pay
steps.person_responsible: JO - Engineer I, Administrative Aide II

steps.client_step: 5. Pay fees at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 5. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II/III

steps.client_step: 6. Return to CEO to submit Proof of Payment
steps.agency_action: 6.1-6.6: Verify payment, sign-off by technical specialists, and prepare endorsement for CMO/CAdO
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III, technical heads

steps.client_step: 7. Proceed to City Administrator or City Mayor's Office
steps.agency_action: 7. Final approval and signature of the Fencing Permit
steps.person_responsible: City Administrator / City Mayor

steps.client_step: 8. Return to CEO for releasing
steps.agency_action: 8. Record and release approved permits and plans
steps.person_responsible: JO - Engineer I

total.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office - Building Permits and Inspection Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizen, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person, firm or corporation who shall install/construct signage to advertise a business within Lipa City

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Notarized Application Form for Signage Permit (4 original)
Architectural Plans (Site development, location, elevation, details) and Structural Plans (5 original each)
Specification & Cost Estimate and Structural Analysis (if applicable)
Barangay Clearance, Tax Declaration, and Updated Tax Receipt/Clearance (5 copies each)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Barangay Hall / Assessor's Office / Treasurer's Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Signage Clearance
Transfer Certificate of Title and Valid ID of Property/Lot Owner

steps.client_step: 1. Sign in the Client Log Book, submit complete requirements, and leave contact information
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive/check completeness and evaluate plans; schedule site inspection within 3 working days
steps.person_responsible: JO - Engineer I, Administrative Aide IV, Building Inspector

steps.client_step: 2. Wait for the scheduled inspection
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2: Conduct site inspection and prepare Inspection Report
steps.person_responsible: Building Inspector, Architect II, Engineer III

steps.client_step: 3. Return to CEO to secure Order of Payment (if compliant)
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.4: Review, approve, and sign Order of Payment; release to client
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III, JO - Engineer I

steps.client_step: 4. Pay at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 4. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II/III

steps.client_step: 5. Return to CEO and submit proof of payment (Official Receipt)
steps.agency_action: 5.1-5.3: Verify receipt, review, and approve Sign Permit
steps.person_responsible: City Engineer, Engineer IV/III, JO - Engineer I

steps.client_step: 6. Sign in the record book and claim the Sign Permit
steps.agency_action: 6. Release Sign Permit and secure client signature
steps.person_responsible: JO - Engineer I, Administrative Aide II

total.fees: Based on Revised IRR of National Building Code
